apartments.title: Apartments
apartments.desc: With kitchens and bathrooms — an excellent choice for families with children or longer stays.

superior.title: Superior Rooms
superior.desc: Higher-standard rooms with bathrooms and private balconies offering magnificent views of Lugano, the lake and the mountains — the full Ticino atmosphere.

budgetPlus.title: Budget Plus Rooms
budgetPlus.desc: More affordable rooms with beautiful views of Lugano, the lake and the mountains (without a private balcony).

budget.title: Budget Rooms
budget.desc: Our most affordable rooms, with private bathrooms — ideal for business or long-distance travellers seeking comfort at a fair price.

hero.seoH1: Hotel Al Ponte Cademario — rooms and apartments with Lake Lugano views
hero.imageAlt: Hotel Al Ponte in Cademario with panoramic views over Lake Lugano

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Book your stay or send us a note. We reply within 24 hours.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.intro: Our hotel offers rooms and apartments of various sizes and standards. We welcome large and small families, couples and business travellers. All rooms have SMART TV and free Wi-Fi. Smoking is not permitted — every room is equipped with a modern fire & alarm system.

bigFamily.name: Big Family Apartment
bigFamily.desc: The ideal choice for large families and groups of friends. The spacious living area, the panoramic terrace and the fully equipped kitchen ensure a comfortable stay in the heart of Ticino.

tripleDependance.name: Triple Dependance Apartment
tripleDependance.desc: A great solution for those seeking the comfort of an apartment at an affordable price. Functional spaces, a private kitchen and a panoramic terrace make it the ideal base to explore Lugano.

doubleSuperior.name: Double Superior Room
doubleSuperior.desc: Ideal for couples seeking comfort and a special atmosphere. The private balcony overlooking Lugano, the lake and the mountains offers unforgettable moments of relaxation.

tripleSuperior.name: Triple Superior Room
tripleSuperior.desc: Ideal for families or small groups seeking extra space and superior comfort. The panoramic balcony and tasteful furnishings ensure a pleasant stay.

doublePanoramaBudgetPlus.name: Double Panorama Budget Plus Room
doublePanoramaBudgetPlus.desc: Ideal for those seeking comfort and breathtaking views. The comfort and the panoramic view over Lugano make this room the perfect choice for a romantic getaway or a leisure trip.

familyBudgetPlusTerrace.name: Family Budget Plus Room with Terrace
familyBudgetPlusTerrace.desc: Ideal for families seeking space at an affordable price. The panoramic terrace and functional spaces ensure comfort and freedom during your stay.

singleBudget.name: Single Budget Room
singleBudget.desc: Ideal for solo travellers or business trips. Comfortable, functional and affordable. Perfect for short stays or stopovers.

doubleBudget.name: Double Budget Room
doubleBudget.desc: An excellent choice for couples seeking a comfortable stay at an affordable price. The simple yet welcoming standard is ideal for short city breaks or business trips.

twinBudget.name: Twin Budget Room
twinBudget.desc: Ideal for travellers and business guests. Comfortable, functional and affordable. Perfect for short stays or stopovers.

view.title: Beautiful View
view.desc: Lugano, the lake and the mountains

terrace.title: Terrace
terrace.desc: perfect for a morning coffee with a view

rooms.heading: Something for everyone

triple.title: Triple Deluxe Apartment
triple.intro: Ideal for families or small groups who appreciate space, comfort, and independence. The private kitchen and balcony overlooking Lugano and the lake create the perfect setting for both short and long stays.

pool.title: Swimming Pool
pool.desc: Cool off in our outdoor pool with panoramic views of Lake Lugano.

pet.title: Pet Friendly
pet.desc: Your furry friend is welcome (small fee applies).

view.title: Beautiful View
view.desc: Panoramic Lake Lugano and mountain vistas from rooms, balconies and pool.

hosts.title: Kind Hosts
hosts.desc: A warm, multilingual family team ready to make you feel at home.

ticket.title: Ticino Ticket
ticket.desc: Free unlimited public transport across Ticino — included with every stay.

wifi.title: Free Wi-Fi
wifi.desc: High-speed Wi-Fi throughout the hotel, rooms, terraces and pool area.

renovated.title: Renovated in 2026
renovated.desc: Fully renovated in 2026 — fresh, modern rooms with stunning panoramic views.

parking.title: Parking Available
parking.desc: Convenient public parking right at the hotel — CHF 5 per day, no reservation needed.

info.title: General information and hotel terms & conditions

hours.title: Basic information — opening hours
hours.openYearRound: The hotel is open all year round.
hours.checkInOut: Check-in is from 15:30 and check-out is by 10:00.
hours.receptionHours: Reception is open from 07:30 to 11:00, and on Fridays and Saturdays also from 15:30 to 19:30.
hours.phone: During reception opening hours, you can contact us by phone on +41 91 605 24 92.
hours.emailOutsideHours: Outside reception opening hours, you can contact us by email at gatti@al-ponte.ch or via Booking.com chat.
hours.checkInDetails: Check-in: available between 15:30 and 24:00, but after 19:30 the reception is closed and only self check-in is available.
hours.checkInBox: NOTE: If we are unable to welcome you in person, we will leave your keys in a special locker (BOX) and send you instructions with the code for the locker.
hours.breakfast: Breakfast (served in the breakfast room): from 08:00 to 10:00.
hours.pool: The swimming pool is open from 08:00 to 19:30.

safety.intro: You can feel safe in our hotel. All areas, including all hotel rooms, are equipped with a modern fire and alarm system, which means that smoking, the use of any other tobacco products, candles, fireworks or other sources of fire or smoke is strictly prohibited throughout the premises (including in the rooms). All communal areas in the hotel (such as the lobby, reception, corridors, terrace, stairwells and breakfast room) are monitored by CCTV cameras. The data controller is Al Ponte Albergo SAGL.
safety.smokingBan: Smoking of cigarettes and all other tobacco products is strictly prohibited throughout the entire building, including all rooms, corridors and the breakfast room. This is due to the need to install and operate a highly sensitive fire alarm system, as required by law.
safety.acknowledgment: By booking a room at our hotel, you confirm that you have read our house rules and agree to all their provisions, including, in particular, the fire safety regulations, and you accept that in the event of failure to comply with the total ban on smoking cigarettes or other tobacco products throughout the premises, in the event of a fire alarm being triggered, you will voluntarily and without objection bear the additional cost associated with the activation of the fire alarm.
safety.pleaseNote: PLEASE NOTE: the guest shall cover all costs associated with the intervention of the fire brigade or other emergency services — not less than CHF 1,500 (the minimum cost the hotel must bear in connection with the fire brigade's intervention — PLEASE NOTE: these costs may be many times higher).

pool.title: Information about the swimming pool
pool.body: There is an indoor swimming pool available to guests on the hotel premises. Use of the swimming pool is free of charge, but additional towels and a bathrobe are subject to a charge — these are issued at reception (during reception opening hours) upon the guest's request.

parking.title: Parking
parking.body: The hotel does not have its own car park. There is a public car park, Al Ponte, near the hotel, as well as plenty of on-street parking spaces. Parking costs CHF 5 per night, and the fee must be paid at the parking meter located at the car park or via a dedicated app. The reception does not collect parking fees.

tax.title: Tourist tax
tax.body: The price of accommodation (booking) does not include the tourist tax, which is CHF 4.20 per person per night and must be paid at reception upon check-in (or the following morning for guests who arrived late and used self check-in).

items.1: Early check-in (for each hour or part thereof before the standard check-in time) — CHF 20.
items.2: Late check-out (for each hour or part thereof after 10:00) — CHF 25.
items.3: Key replacement fee — CHF 50 per key.
items.4: Additional cleaning on request — CHF 40 per cleaning session.
items.5: Additional pool towel — CHF 5 per towel.
items.6: Bathrobe for the pool — CHF 8 per item.
items.7: Additional fridge on request (subject to availability) — CHF 20 per item.
items.8: Cot on request (subject to availability) — CHF 25 per item.
items.9: Additional fold-out bed in the room (subject to availability and space in the room) — CHF 50.
items.10: Pet fee — CHF 20 per day per pet.
items.11: Additional charge for triggering the fire alarm — no less than CHF 1,500. PLEASE NOTE: the guest is liable for all costs associated with the intervention of the fire brigade or other emergency services — no less than CHF 1,500 (the minimum cost the hotel must bear in connection with the alarm being triggered and the fire brigade's intervention).
items.12: Breakfast (unless already included in the room rate) — CHF 12 per person (payment at reception).

tv.title: Information regarding TV
tv.body: All rooms in our hotel are equipped with SMART TVs, but you must have your own access (subscription) to services such as Zatto, Netflix or Disney in order to watch TV or films.

transport.title: Free public transport ticket
transport.body: If you would like to receive a Ticino Ticket to use free public transport in the canton of Ticino during your stay at our hotel, please provide an email address to which we can send the ticket electronically. The Ticino Ticket will help you reduce your transport costs.

otherRequests.title: Other guest requests
otherRequests.body: Our team is preparing for your arrival and looks forward to welcoming you to our hotel. Please let us know before your arrival if there is anything else we can assist you with.

info.signoff: Warm regards — the Al Ponte Albergo Hotel team.

attractions.lakeAlt: Panoramic view over Lake Lugano from the Ticino mountains
attractions.seoTitle: Things to do in Cademario & Ticino
attractions.seoDescription: Discover the best attractions around Cademario and Lugano. Hiking trails, charming villages and panoramic peaks, all free with your Ticino Ticket!
attractions.title: Your Perfect Holiday Starts Here
attractions.intro: Welcome to Ticino, a region full of charm, nature, and unforgettable experiences. To help you make the most of your stay, we've created an inspiring selection of activities, all easily accessible and stress-free thanks to your Ticino Ticket, included with your reservation.
attractions.closing: Everything within reach, and free with your Ticino Ticket.

items.text: After arriving, simply park your car and start exploring. The bus stop is just 25 meters from the hotel, with convenient connections every hour. The last bus back to Al Ponte leaves Lugano (Autosilo Balestra) at 22:00, with extended service until midnight on Fridays and Saturdays.

items.heading: Chiesa San Bernardo
items.text: A 12th-century Romanesque church, picturesquely nestled among chestnut trees, offering one of the most beautiful viewpoints in the region.

items.heading: Monastero SS. Francesco e Chiara (Monastery of St. Clare)
items.text: A modern monastery of the Poor Clare nuns, founded in 1992. This place of peace and contemplation attracts visitors with its peaceful energy and its modest yet beautiful architecture, nestled into the Alpine landscape.

items.heading: Hiking and Nature
items.text: Numerous trails lead through the Malcantone forests, ideal for hiking with views of Lake Lugano.
Cademario is also a great place for lovers of bicycles and bicycle tours.
Begin your journey with a relaxing afternoon stroll through the beautiful Parco Ciani, followed by a delightful dinner in Lugano. In summer, enjoy pedal boating or a refreshing swim in the lake.

Spectacular panoramic views await you on Monte Generoso, Monte Brè, and Monte San Salvatore. All three peaks are visible from Al Ponte and are easily reachable by bus or train—completely free with your Ticino Ticket.

Just 1 km from the hotel you'll find idyllic nature trails offering breathtaking views. Follow the path to discover a small, refreshing waterfall and an old Mulino—perfect for a peaceful afternoon escape.
Every Wednesday, take the bus to the famous Luino Market on Lago Maggiore. Enjoy a vibrant shopping atmosphere, local products, and the charm of Italy just across the border.
Discover Caslano, a picturesque village with a genuine Italian-Ticino ambiance.
Nearby, families will love the small yet delightful Zoo in Magliaso.
Visit Melide and the iconic Swissminiatur, only minutes away by train.
Or explore Morcote and the enchanting Parco Scherrer with a scenic boat ride along the lake.
For shopping lovers, Fox Town in Mendrisio awaits with designer outlets and great deals—open even on Sundays and easily reachable by train.
Don't miss Ascona and Locarno, two elegant towns on Lake Maggiore. Relax along their lakeside promenades, visit local cafés, and enjoy the magical atmosphere.
Extend your adventure with a TILO train ride to Como or Milan—ideal destinations for culture, shopping, and world-famous gelato.

For thrill-seekers, the Verzasca Valley and Maggia Valley offer breathtaking landscapes, crystal-clear rivers, and exciting activities such as bungee jumping at Verzasca or watching the Red Bull Cliff Diving show.

seo.ogAlt: Hotel Al Ponte Cademario — boutique hotel on Lake Lugano, Ticino

home.title: Hotel Al Ponte Cademario – Rooms & Apartments with Lake Lugano Views
home.description: Boutique hotel in Cademario, on Lake Lugano. Rooms and apartments with panoramic views, swimming pool, free Wi-Fi, parking and pet friendly. Ticino Ticket included with every stay.

informations.title: Information & house rules
informations.description: Opening hours, check-in and check-out, swimming pool, parking, tourist tax and house rules for Al Ponte Albergo in Cademario, Ticino.

danny.quote: Our stay at Al Ponte was amazing! Located in Cademario, you have a stunning view of the Lugano region. The service all around was fantastico!

domeh.quote: The view is simply breathtaking! Situated high above Lugano, you really feel like you are above all else.

iren.quote: Al Ponte is a warm, family-run gem that truly exceeded our expectations. We truly felt at home.

dachelle.quote: The food was delicious, the staff was so kind and attentive, and the views were amazing!

robert.quote: The place has a unique atmosphere. The owners are super friendly. Food excellent. The view breathtaking.

michaelt.quote: The balcony view is just a dream and we had total peace and quiet.

sadaf.quote: Fabulous hostess, a real pleasure to meet her. Property was nearly on top of a mountain and had a fantastic view.

icegirl.quote: Family-run hotel, small but nice! Super friendly people — we've been here for the second year in a row.

romuald.quote: Exceptional views. Staff impeccable. Super clean. Silence, calmness.

jose.quote: At Al Ponte, if you absorb the energy of the place well, you can really relax.

patrick.quote: Lovely hotel run by a family, with amazing views on Lake Lugano. Very nice, friendly owners.
